roles.title: Mobile App Developer (Agentic Coding Contractor)
roles.rawNotes: I am a agentic coding contractor in Anotoys labs until now. what I do is I develop an android and ios app using cursor. I am developing this app which that is use to monitor a sipa, a game in the philippines. the app count how many times the player kicks the sipa maintaining it in the air until it hits the ground. it uses a google image processing model to detect the player and a onnx file created by a in house ai developer to the detect the sipa. as the app developer, I make sure that all the models, including the onnx file, is implemented in the mobile app. I maintain the screen navigation and ALL stuffs related to mobile development.

bullets.text: Developed a cross-platform Android and iOS application, using Cursor as an AI-assisted coding environment, to monitor sipa (a traditional Filipino game), automatically counting how many consecutive times a player kicks the sipa to keep it airborne before it hits the ground.
bullets.source: I develop an android and ios app using cursor. I am developing this app which that is use to monitor a sipa, a game in the philippines. the app count how many times the player kicks the sipa maintaining it in the air until it hits the ground.

bullets.text: Integrated a Google image processing model for player detection alongside an ONNX model, built by an in-house AI developer, for sipa detection, combining both into a single real-time on-device inference pipeline.
bullets.source: it uses a google image processing model to detect the player and a onnx file created by a in house ai developer to the detect the sipa.

bullets.text: Owned implementation of all detection models, including the ONNX sipa detector, within the mobile app as the sole app developer on the project.
bullets.source: as the app developer, I make sure that all the models, including the onnx file, is implemented in the mobile app.

bullets.text: Built and maintained the app's screen navigation and all other mobile development concerns end-to-end.
bullets.source: I maintain the screen navigation and ALL stuffs related to mobile development.
